entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: A legume crop grown at the ICRISAT Center.

entities.name: ICRISAT CENTER
entities.description: The research center where chickpea is grown.

entities.name: RAINY SEASON
entities.description: The season in which chickpea is grown as a crop.

entities.name: RESIDUAL MOISTURE
entities.description: The moisture remaining in the soil used for growing chickpea.

entities.name: IRRIGATION
entities.description: The artificial application of water to land or soil.

entities.name: DROUGHT
entities.description: A period of abnormally dry weather, regarded as the foremost abiotic stress factor for chickpea.

entities.name: ABIOTIC STRESS FACTOR
entities.description: Non-living factors that cause stress to plants, such as drought.
